description: CompositionYellow round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves, graphic print on the front and a deep curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash inside out in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsGroove to the tunes of Urban Folk in style with this black t-shirt from wrangler. The long sleeves keeps you cosy, while the cotton fabric keeps your fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes or cotton shorts and sandals for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 5'7", chest 33" and waist 26”
